Product Details
Y-Rings

Hydraulic sealing elements developed for piston and rod applications under pressure.

← Back to Product Center

Industrial Product

Y-Rings

A dependable solution for hydraulic equipment requiring sealing performance and wear resistance.

CHX Y-Rings are designed to maintain stable sealing under working pressure while balancing friction and structural durability.

Pressure Response

Works efficiently in hydraulic systems with varying pressure loads.

Wear Resistance

Suitable for repeated reciprocating movement in cylinders and actuators.

Process Compatibility

Can be paired with supporting rings and system-specific structures.
